locales.CameraUsageDescription: Muffin needs the access to Camera, for a better game experience

locales.UserTrackUsageDescription: Allow 'Go!Go!Muffin' to track your activity across other companies' apps and websites? We would like your permission to provide better services, and minimize the interruption induced by irrelevant services

locales.CameraUsageDescription: 麦芬需要开启相机为你获得更完整的游戏体验，确认的事情就拜托咯！

locales.UserTrackUsageDescription: 允许'麦芬'跟踪您在其他公司的APP和网站上的活动吗？ 我们想要获得您的允许，从而能为您提供更好的服务，并尽可能减少这些服务对您的打扰

locales.UserTrackUsageDescription: 允許'麥芬'追蹤您在其他公司的APP和網站上的活動嗎？ 我們想要獲得您的允許，從而能爲您提供更好的服務，並盡可能減少這些服務對您的打擾
